decontamination_notes: Sourced from the MIT-licensed more-itertools library (https://github.com/more-itertools/more-itertools), LICENSE preserved. repo/more_itertools/{__init__,more,recipes}.py are the verbatim upstream files at base_commit c5538f9ff7f3fa92ac0fe378b5c70486494c040b (the parent of the fix). The bug (iter_index raising ValueError on negative start/stop for general iterables because islice rejects negative indices while the sequence fast path does not) was fixed upstream in commit 43decdd76072519fbf1392fb3d066ad26601c147 on 2026-06-17, which is after the training cutoffs of the models under evaluation, so this task is decontaminated. The hidden test is the upstream test from that commit. Decontamination should be re-verified if a model's cutoff is later than 2026-06-17.
